samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a 64-bit ripple carry adder.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="adda">64-bit input addend A.</input>
        <input id="addb">64-bit input addend B.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output sum.</output>
        <input id="i_en">Input enable signal.</input>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal.</output>
    </ports>    
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="N">4</parameter>
        <parameter id="N1">3</parameter>
        <parameter id="N2">2</parameter>
        <parameter id="N3">1</parameter>
        <parameter id="N4">0</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="adda_reg" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input addend A.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="addb_reg" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input addend B.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="adda_reg_1" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input addend A.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="addb_reg_1" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input addend B.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="adda_reg_2" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input addend A.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="addb_reg_2" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input addend B.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="adda_reg_3" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input addend A.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="addb_reg_3" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input addend B.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="c_reg" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit carry.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="c_reg_1" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit carry.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="c_reg_2" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit carry.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="c_reg_3" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit carry.</reg>
        
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="sum_reg" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit sum.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="i_en_reg">Input enable.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="i_en_reg_1">Input enable.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="i_en_reg_2">Input enable.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="i_en_reg_3">Input enable.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="o_en_reg">Output enable.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="o_en_reg_1">Output enable.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="o_en_reg_2">Output enable.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="o_en_reg_3">Output enable.</reg>
        
        <wire id="sum_reg_temp" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit temporary sum.</wire>
        <wire id="carry_out_temp" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit temporary carry.</wire>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
    The module performs 64-bit ripple carry addition with the input operands adda and addb.
    It includes several registers to enable the pipeline stages and synchronize the input enable signal i_en.
    The registers are controlled by the clock and reset signals.
    The sum values for each pipeline stage are calculated by adding the input operands and carry signals.
    The output enable signal o_en is updated based on the pipeline stages and synchronized with the clock and reset signals.
    </implementation>
   
</module>
